title: Coming Soon to The Dungeon Dive! (Warhammer Quest, solo RPGs, Cthuhlu, and more!)
body:
Daniel (@dungeondive) shares his 2026 preview stack — a massive haul of games waiting to hit the channel, from big-box adventures to indie solo RPGs.

Highlights from the stack:

  • Warhammer Quest: Dark Water — Daniel’s excited about the variety and narrative skirmish approach
  • Western Legends — Finally broke down and bought it with all expansions
  • Caught in the Rain — A solo mystery RPG that claims to actually make mysteries work solo (bold claim!)
  • Morin: Lords of Midnight and Order of Eventide — Barbarian Prince-inspired hex crawls
  • Four Against Darkness Enhanced Edition — The 200-page compilation is incoming
  • Dead Flesh — Mork Borg-powered zombie survival
  • Whispers of the Woods and Forgotten Ballad — Charming indie RPGs with Zelda-esque vibes

Daniel also mentions that 90-95% of games on the channel are bought with his own money (Patreon support goes right back into games), and teases a binder full of free/flat-pack games for a future video.

What from this list are you most keen to see covered? Any recommendations Daniel should add to the pile?
